name: Biscotti Napoletani
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
In a mixing bowl, add flour, sugar, finely ground almonds, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon. Stir to combine. Add whole almonds, corn syrup, and water, and mix until a firm dough forms.
Roll into a 15-inch log. Place on a sheet pan lined with foil. Bake in the center oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes.
Cool slightly. Place the log on a cutting board and slice diagonally at 1/2-inch intervals.
Return to the sheet pan, cut side down, and bake until lightly browned, about 15 more minutes. Cool on the pan.
